name: cc-enslaver
description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.11 adds rule 08 (read-before-edit / think-before-write) + rule 09 (systematic modification, no patch-style) with physical enforcement: PreToolUse(Edit|Write) now intercepts unjustified patch markers (try/except: pass, # noqa, @ts-ignore, eslint-disable, time.sleep over a race) in new_string content; Stop hook gains two layers (e + f) scoped to turns that actually edited files. Includes a full prompts/commands regularization pass (standard response skeleton, 9-question per-turn self-check checklist).
